description_long: This is a clear, cylindrical glass bottle with a wide body and a short neck, topped with a brown cap. The bottle features a prominent black label on the front, displaying the text 'Tony's Crow Trees' in white, along with a stylized white tree graphic. The glass is slightly tinted, giving the bottle a subtle bluish hue, and the transparency allows the interior to be seen, revealing it is empty. The cap appears to be made of a different material, possibly plastic or wood, and fits snugly on the neck. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for holding liquids. The bottle's clean lines and visible branding make it stand out as a personal item, likely used for beverages or specialty liquids.
description: A clear, cylindrical glass bottle with a brown cap and a black label reading 'Tony's Crow Trees' with a white tree graphic. The bottle is empty, slightly bluish, and features prominent branding on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black label with 'Tony's Crow Trees' and a white tree graphic, as well as the brown cap.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bottle's cylindrical shape, the thickness of the glass, and partial visibility of the label's edge.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the bottle, with the label visible in reverse through the transparent glass.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, highlighting the bottle's roundness and the other edge of the label.
attribute_label_or_branding: A black label on the front with white handwritten-style text reading 'Tony's Crow Trees' and a stylized white tree graphic.
